title: Analytics Dashboard
lede: Read your call center's key numbers at a glance on the Overview page, then filter them by date, phone number, agent, tags, or owner to answer any question about your calling.

steps.title: Open the Overview page
steps.content:
1. Click Overview at the top of the left menu (it's also the page you land on at / when you log in).
  2. The top card, Total Statistics, shows all-time totals for your account — contacts, leads, accounts, AI agents, campaigns, phone numbers, and more. These are independent of any date filter.

images.caption: The Overview page opens with Total Statistics, performance cards, filters, and a calls table
The Overview page opens with Total Statistics, performance cards, filters, and a calls table

steps.title: Read the four performance cards
steps.content:
Just below Total Statistics are four cards that reflect the date range you've selected:

  • Total calls — how many calls were made and received, with average duration.
  • Total minutes — total talk time, with your success rate.
  • Total spent — total cost for the period, with cost per minute.
  • Avg cost / call — average price of a single call, with cost per day.

These update automatically whenever you change the date range or any filter.

images.caption: Total calls, minutes, spend, and average cost per call for the selected period
Total calls, minutes, spend, and average cost per call for the selected period

steps.title: Filter by date, agent, and more
steps.content:
Use the Filters bar to narrow the numbers and the calls table below it:

  1. Date — pick Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Last 30 Days, or Custom Range for exact dates.
  2. Phone numbers — limit to calls on one of your numbers.
  3. Agent — focus on a single AI agent (or Web Dialer for manual calls).
  4. Tags — filter by outcome, such as Voicemail, No Answer, Transfer, or Calendar.
  5. Owner — view only a specific team member's calls.

You can also type a name in Search customer to find a specific contact's calls.

steps.title: Drill into calls and charts
steps.content:
• The Calls table lists every call in the window with the contact, agent/campaign, date, duration, type, tags, and owner. Click a row's eye icon to open the full call detail.
  • At the bottom, three charts break the data down further: Reason call ended, Avg duration by agent, and Call volume by hour — useful for spotting your busiest times and best-performing agents.
